title: DSWO Etawah – Subject Specialist (Guest Faculty) – 21 Posts
shortInfo: District Social Welfare Officer, Etawah (DSWO Etawah) Recruitment 2026 for 21 posts of Subject Specialist (Guest Faculty). Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 26-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DSWO Etawah official website.

basic_details.job_title: DSWO Etawah Subject Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Officer, Etawah (DSWO Etawah) Recruitment 2026 for 21 posts of Subject Specialist (Guest Faculty). Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 26-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DSWO Etawah official website.

qualification.education_qualification: University/College teacher or UPSC main exam qualified or PCS interview qualified or 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute, M.Sc First Class in relevant subject with 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: Etawahh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: DSWO Etawa Indian Polity and Governance
